display-name.lang: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland
United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland
United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Hitler's Supercars
programme.desc: Documentary charting the rise of Nazi Germany's Silver Arrow Grand Prix and speed record cars of the 1930s.

programme.title: Mammals
programme.desc: David Attenborough narrates a look into the lives of mammals and how they have adapted to their surroundings. The first episode features animals that thrive in the dark.

programme.title: Mammals
programme.desc: A look at how mammals adapt to the changes humans have made to their environment.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash: Restoring Classics
programme.desc: The team seek out a sturdy, reliable 4x4 to tackle the rugged Yorkshire landscape in, but get side-tracked into a slightly rusty Subaru Impreza Turbo 2000. S.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Derek is on the road to pick up a funky little Nissan Figaro and a sublime Ferrari 250 GT tribute car, and Paul gets to try out his spanking new Scania T Cab.

programme.title: Resto My Ride
programme.desc: A 1939 Chrysler Royal arrives out of storage to the garage. It undergoes a surprise transformation for the client and is literally given the 'royal treatment'.

programme.title: Seven Worlds One Planet
programme.desc: David Attenborough looks at the fauna of Africa, home to the greatest wildlife gatherings on Earth. But even in this land of plenty, animals face big challenges.

programme.title: Flipping Bangers
programme.desc: Will and Gus find a Reliant Kitten that an engineer has given up on - the body is detached, it doesn't run and most of the bits it needs are in boxes in the boot.

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien are in Wales, where they pick up and restore a dentist's table and a barber's chair, and make a coffee table out of parquet flooring.

programme.title: Trawlermen: Hunting the Catch
programme.desc: The crew of Karen of Ladram hunts hake off of Cornwall, a rookie crew works in the Irish Sea, and trainee skipper Michael steps up in a storm.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from Home.

programme.title: Great British Landmark Fixers
programme.desc: After 14 decades centre stage the Manchester Town Hall is in urgent need of repair. Now a dedicated team are working hard to do this Architectural giant justice.

programme.title: Great British Landmark Fixers
programme.desc: The Victorian London sewer system is getting a 21st century upgrade. Machines bore a network of tunnels linking Bazalgette's old sewer network to the Tideway Super-Sewer.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: A 1970s Bond Bug three-wheeler divides opinion among Mathewsons customers, while a retired engineer reluctantly auctions off his father's treasured 60s Jaguar Mark 2.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Mathewsons agree to sell a vintage threshing machine and collection of tractors, but extracting them from a Yorkshire farm proves a bigger job than anticipated.

programme.title: Auschwitz: The Nazis and the Final Solution
programme.desc: Charting the evolution of Auschwitz concentration camp and the mentality of its perpetrators. This episode looks at the camp's beginnings.

programme.title: Ghosts of Alderney
programme.desc: Piers Secunda uncovers the hidden history of Alderney, to reveal new evidence of atrocities committed by the Nazis on British soil during World War two.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the team visit Dulwich Art Gallery in south London. Items brought in for appraisal include one of the most valuable paintings seen on the programme.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce presents the second of two programmes from Dulwich Picture Gallery in south London, where items include an early illustration by Heath Robinson.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Dave goes to Wales to bag a Sierra Cosworth, a sought-after car in the bidding market. Dad Derek gets his hands on a more sedate 1926 Standard Tourer.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Derek heads to Suffolk to collect two Bentleys with a majestic pedigree; Cynthia a stunning 1963 S3 and Harry, a 1965 Continental.

programme.title: Auschwitz: The Nazis and the Final Solution
programme.desc: Charting the evolution of Auschwitz concentration camp and the mentality of its perpetrators. This episode looks at the camp's beginnings.

programme.title: Ghosts of Alderney
programme.desc: Piers Secunda uncovers the hidden history of Alderney, to reveal new evidence of atrocities committed by the Nazis on British soil during World War two.

programme.title: Mammals
programme.desc: How air-breathing mammals have found remarkable ways to overcome the many challenges of a life in water, from freshwater jungle ponds to the dark depths of the open ocean.

programme.title: Mammals
programme.desc: From ice-covered seas to snow-capped mountains, mammals have conquered the cold, living in the harshest places on earth thanks to their intelligence and adaptations.

programme.title: Porridge Christmas Special No Way Out
programme.desc: The festive season falls upon the inmates of Slade and finds them planning an escape. But Fletch plans to spend some time in the infirmary.

programme.title: Porridge Christmas Special The Desperate Hours
programme.desc: Comedy legend Ronnie Barker stars as Fletch in this Christmas special. Fletcher plans some festive spirit at Slade in the form of his very own homemade liquor.

programme.title: Attenborough's Birds of Paradise
programme.desc: David Attenborough narrates as New Guinean naturalists embark on a gruelling expedition to find ten birds-of-paradise, deep in the heart of the rainforest.

programme.title: Natural World: Attenborough's Wonder Of Eggs
programme.desc: David Attenborough reveals the secrets of birds' eggs from creation to hatching, exploring how they are made, the reasons behind their shape and their intrinsic purpose.

programme.title: The Mentalist
programme.desc: Patrick is forced to help his estranged brother-in-law, who is embroiled in a murder investigation after one of his marks in an investment scam turns up dead.

programme.title: Hudson & Rex
programme.desc: After a socialite narrowly escapes being poisoned, Charlie and Rex uncover a string of suspects - including an old flame of Jesse's.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: An investigation gets under way when a girl is left for dead at a boys school fete. Mark Williams stars in this drama, based on the stories by GK Chesterton.

programme.title: Unforgettable
programme.desc: Poppy Montgomery stars in the crime drama series. The murder of a lawyer leads Carrie and Al into a deadly revenge plot playing out in a federal courthouse.

programme.title: Saint-Pierre
programme.desc: Fitz and Arch work with a Newfoundland Officer from Fitz's past to apprehend an infamous bank robber who's escaped to Saint-Pierre.

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: Kris Marshall is the detective on a Caribbean island. DI Goodman is embroiled in the cut-throat world of corporate team building.

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: New arrival DI Neville Parker gets more than he bargained for when investigating the mysterious death of a young woman at the unveiling of a luxury timeshare resort.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: An investigation gets under way when a girl is left for dead at a boys school fete. Mark Williams stars in this drama, based on the stories by GK Chesterton.

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: Kris Marshall is the detective on a Caribbean island. DI Goodman is embroiled in the cut-throat world of corporate team building.

programme.title: Hudson & Rex
programme.desc: After a socialite narrowly escapes being poisoned, Charlie and Rex uncover a string of suspects - including an old flame of Jesse's.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: When Higgins and Roberts are convinced to invest in a new automat diner, Murdoch finds an unfortunate link between their undertaking and the death of a young man.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: After he witnesses the murder of a man on the street, Murdoch finds himself caught up in the beef between the Irish Catholics and Protestants.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from Home.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from Home.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: Murdoch and Brackenreid are stunned witnesses when a local production of Hamlet comes to an abrupt end after the actor playing the King is poisoned on stage.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: After a small aeroplane crashes in downtown Toronto killing the pilot, Murdoch discovers it was deployed with deadly chemicals.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: The locals are unhappy when an ostentatious American opens a golf club near Kembleford - only for a body to turn up in the reeds.

programme.title: The Mentalist
programme.desc: A murder case leads Patrick into conflict with charismatic cult leader Bret Stiles, who offers him information regarding the identity of serial killer Red John.

programme.title: Hudson & Rex
programme.desc: When a young woman is abducted from the place her friend was murdered two years earlier, Charlie and Rex discover she was trying to solve the cold case.

programme.title: Unforgettable
programme.desc: Crime drama series. The investigation into a high school student's fatal fall leads Al and Carrie to suspect she was murdered to cover up an unwanted pregnancy.

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: Kris Marshall is the detective on a Caribbean island. When a prisoner is killed in their custody, the team are under pressure to solve the case quickly.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: Murdoch and Brackenreid are stunned witnesses when a local production of Hamlet comes to an abrupt end after the actor playing the King is poisoned on stage.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: After a small aeroplane crashes in downtown Toronto killing the pilot, Murdoch discovers it was deployed with deadly chemicals.

programme.title: The Mentalist
programme.desc: A murder case leads Patrick into conflict with charismatic cult leader Bret Stiles, who offers him information regarding the identity of serial killer Red John.

programme.title: Hudson & Rex
programme.desc: When a young woman is abducted from the place her friend was murdered two years earlier, Charlie and Rex discover she was trying to solve the cold case.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: The locals are unhappy when an ostentatious American opens a golf club near Kembleford - only for a body to turn up in the reeds.

programme.title: Unforgettable
programme.desc: Crime drama series. The investigation into a high school student's fatal fall leads Al and Carrie to suspect she was murdered to cover up an unwanted pregnancy.

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: Kris Marshall is the detective on a Caribbean island. When a prisoner is killed in their custody, the team are under pressure to solve the case quickly.

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: New arrival DI Neville Parker gets more than he bargained for when investigating the mysterious death of a young woman at the unveiling of a luxury timeshare resort.

programme.title: Allegiance
programme.desc: A call to a motel leads Sabrina and Vince into the underbelly of a migrant worker trafficking ring. Ishaan sends Kyle undercover to meet a white supremacist.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Te Karere
programme.desc: Te Karere brings you key events and stories of interest to Māori as well as bringing a Māori perspective to the day's news and current affairs.

programme.title: BNZ Business Breakfast
programme.desc: Join BNZ Business Breakfast for a sharp, authoritative start to the business day. In just 30 minutes we set the agenda — fast, focused, and forward-looking.

programme.title: Breakfast
programme.desc: Start your day off right as the Breakfast team brings you all the latest in news, weather, sport and entertainment.

programme.title: The Finish Line
programme.desc: The more you know, the further you go. Knowledge equals speed as contestants battle it out to reach the finish line first. Action-packed quiz fun with Roman Kemp and Sarah Greene.

programme.title: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Fantastic quiz show in which four players take on a machine in the hopes of winning its 10,000 pounds jackpot. Only one can win!

programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: It's game on as teams of complete strangers work together to win money and try and defeat the Chaser, a ruthless quiz genius, who wants to leave them with nothing!

programme.title: Tenable
programme.desc: Gameshow hosted by Warwick Davis. Five contestants attempt to answer top 10 list questions for the chance to win a big cash prize. The more top ten lists, the greater the jackpot.

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Long-running soap following the ups and downs of village life amid the rolling scenery of the Yorkshire Dales.

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Long-running drama with the residents of England's most famous cobbled street.

programme.title: Go Girls
programme.desc: Kevin needs a lot of looking after - but how far should a caregiver go? Plus, Olivia gets judgement from beyond the grave. S4 E3

programme.title: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Fantastic quiz show in which four players take on a machine in the hopes of winning its 10,000 pounds jackpot. Only one can win!

programme.title: Te Karere
programme.desc: Te Karere brings you key events and stories of interest to Māori as well as bringing a Māori perspective to the day's news and current affairs.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal Australia
programme.desc: Join host Grant Denyer for a round of this high pressure and high stakes game show, where contestants face up to the Banker and must decide: is it deal or no deal?

programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: It's game on as teams of complete strangers work together to win money and try and defeat the Chaser, a ruthless quiz genius, who wants to leave them with nothing! Hosted by Bradley Walsh.

programme.title: 1News at Six
programme.desc: The nation's leading team of journalists brings viewers the latest news and sport, plus the most comprehensive weather report.

programme.title: Seven Sharp
programme.desc: Join Hilary Barry, Jeremy Wells and the team for a fresh perspective on today's stories.

programme.title: The Repair Shop
programme.desc: Nestled deep in the British countryside, The Repair Shop is a place where battered, broken but beloved artefacts are brought back to life.

programme.title: Chateau DIY
programme.desc: Tim and Sasha are under pressure to finally complete a deluxe wine barrel project. In the foothills of the Pyrenees, Trish is overhauling a guest bedroom.

programme.title: Impossible Builds
programme.desc: Season Premiere: After years traveling, Iain and Alyson are ready to put down roots. Their search takes them to Inner Hebridean Island of Skye where they purchase a remote half acre plot.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal Australia
programme.desc: Join host Grant Denyer for a round of this high pressure and high stakes game show, where contestants face up to the Banker and must decide: is it deal or no deal?

programme.title: FIFA World Cup 2026 Preview Series‎
programme.desc: As the FIFA World Cup 2026 fast approaches, this preview series looks at all the nations that will be competing across the United States, Canada and Mexico with the goal of lifting the World Cup.

programme.title: Amazing Hotels: Life Beyond The Lobby
programme.desc: Rob and Monica make the journey to Turkey to work at a hotel built into a network of caves, where modern luxury meets ancient history and every room comes with its own surprises.

programme.title: 800 Words
programme.desc: George and Fiona put the heat on their new relationship with a dinner party and a new table. S2 E10

programme.title: Te Karere
programme.desc: Te Karere brings you key events and stories of interest to Māori as well as bringing a Māori perspective to the day's news and current affairs.

programme.title: Infomercials

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Fishing and Adventure
programme.desc: It's a big fish, light gear challenge out from Whanganui as the boys go toe to toe with big west coast snapper and kingfish.

programme.title: Rural Delivery
programme.desc: A future-focused dairying approach with plantain at LUDF; a flexible milking system improves life for farmers and cows; and Wheytech Bionics develop a new sweetener from a by-product of cheese-making.

programme.title: Hyundai Country Calendar
programme.desc: A young Kāpiti couple runs a thriving business shearing and fencing on lifestyle blocks while also taming a run-down farm and saving up to buy one of their own.

programme.title: Dog Squad Puppy School
programme.desc: Police pup Alfa’s on the trail, LandSAR snow dog Nala’s on the pounce and is Corrections pup Blaze made up of brains or brawn? S4 E4

programme.title: Tagata Pasifika
programme.desc: Tagata Pasifika is TVNZ's flagship Pacific news show, telling the stories of Pacific Islanders and its community. Made with the support of NZ on Air.

programme.title: Find My Country House Canada
programme.desc: Couples looking to relocate from the city find their perfect country house in a regional, Canadian location.

programme.title: John & Lisa's Weekend Kitchen
programme.desc: John and Lisa celebrate the humble and low-cost staple that is rice with dishes that include gloriously good Thai mango sticky rice to enjoy at any time of the day.

programme.title: Jeremy Pang's Hong Kong Kitchen
programme.desc: Jeremy invites good friend and TV personality Tom Skinner to Hong Kong as they tuck into iconic breakfasts, sweet treats, and a good old cup of tea.

programme.title: The World at War
programme.desc: Laurence Olivier narrates this exhaustive account of World War II. In the deserts of North Africa, the 8th Army battles against Rommel's Afrika Korps.

programme.title: The World at War
programme.desc: A milestone in TV history: Laurence Olivier tells the story of WWII. Hitler turns his tanks towards Russia. After a succession of victories, the Germans delay fatally.

programme.title: The World at War
programme.desc: December 7, 1941 saw the infamous Japanese attack on Pearl Harbor. Laurence Olivier revisits this pivotal moment of World War II in the much-praised documentary series.

programme.title: The World at War
programme.desc: Recalling America's entry into World War II after the Japanese attack on Pearl Harbor, the great Laurence Olivier sheds more light on the deadliest conflict in history.

programme.title: The World at War
programme.desc: Laurence Olivier narrates this exhaustive account of World War II. In the deserts of North Africa, the 8th Army battles against Rommel's Afrika Korps.

programme.title: The World at War
programme.desc: A milestone in TV history: Laurence Olivier tells the story of WWII. Hitler turns his tanks towards Russia. After a succession of victories, the Germans delay fatally.

programme.title: The World at War
programme.desc: December 7, 1941 saw the infamous Japanese attack on Pearl Harbor. Laurence Olivier revisits this pivotal moment of World War II in the much-praised documentary series.

programme.title: The World at War
programme.desc: Recalling America's entry into World War II after the Japanese attack on Pearl Harbor, the great Laurence Olivier sheds more light on the deadliest conflict in history.

programme.title: The World at War
programme.desc: Laurence Olivier narrates this exhaustive account of World War II. In the deserts of North Africa, the 8th Army battles against Rommel's Afrika Korps.

programme.title: The World at War
programme.desc: A milestone in TV history: Laurence Olivier tells the story of WWII. Hitler turns his tanks towards Russia. After a succession of victories, the Germans delay fatally.

programme.title: The World at War
programme.desc: December 7, 1941 saw the infamous Japanese attack on Pearl Harbor. Laurence Olivier revisits this pivotal moment of World War II in the much-praised documentary series.

programme.title: The World at War
programme.desc: Recalling America's entry into World War II after the Japanese attack on Pearl Harbor, the great Laurence Olivier sheds more light on the deadliest conflict in history.

programme.title: River Walks
programme.desc: Blind adventurer Amar Latif takes us along one of Yorkshire's most stunning river valleys as he abseils into a hidden gorge and meets some local llamas.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from Home.

programme.title: Greece with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: Simon Reeve travels from the Peloponnese peninsula to the rugged and mountainous north of the country and learns how its people cope with seemingly never-ending crises.

programme.title: Ireland with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: Simon begins his journey in the south of Ireland by paramotoring with an Irish explorer before doing a spot of surfing and climbing Croagh Patrick in honour of Ireland's patron saint.

programme.title: Ireland with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: Starting at the Giant's Causeway, Simon travels down the east coast to the rapidly changing cities of Belfast and Dublin before ending his tour in the Wicklow Mountains.

programme.title: Mediterranean with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: Simon Reeve embarks on the first leg of an extraordinary four-part journey around the Mediterranean, travelling from Malta across the sea to southern Italy and on to Albania.

programme.title: Greece with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: Simon Reeve travels from the Peloponnese peninsula to the rugged and mountainous north of the country and learns how its people cope with seemingly never-ending crises.

programme.title: Ireland with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: Simon begins his journey in the south of Ireland by paramotoring with an Irish explorer before doing a spot of surfing and climbing Croagh Patrick in honour of Ireland's patron saint.

programme.title: Ireland with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: Starting at the Giant's Causeway, Simon travels down the east coast to the rapidly changing cities of Belfast and Dublin before ending his tour in the Wicklow Mountains.

programme.title: Mediterranean with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: Simon Reeve embarks on the first leg of an extraordinary four-part journey around the Mediterranean, travelling from Malta across the sea to southern Italy and on to Albania.

programme.title: Bread
programme.desc: It's the first episode in the second series of the Liverpool-based sitcom written by Carla Lane. Jack is held at gunpoint by two scallywags - only their gun is a water pistol.

programme.title: Bread
programme.desc: More fun with the Boswells as they duck and dive their way through life's mishaps in Carla Lane's Liverpudlian sitcom. Will all run smoothly when Caroline gives birth.

programme.title: Bread
programme.desc: More from Carla Lane's top-rated Liverpudlian sitcom about a family of loveable rogues. Here, Jack tries to make a profit on a batch of antique hats.

programme.title: Bread
programme.desc: 1980s fashions going haywire only adds to the fun in this sitcom about a roguish Liverpudlian family. Here, Adrian's not having a good time, and Aveline stays in Manchester.

programme.title: Bread
programme.desc: Cheeky comedy with the Liverpudlian dysfunctional family. Pa Boswell causes disruption when he returns home, but Aveline and Julie create even more when they leave.

programme.title: Bread
programme.desc: Carla Lane's Liverpudlian sitcom about a family of loveable rogues. The neutering of the Boswell's dog sparks off some unusual behaviour in the household.

programme.title: Bread
programme.desc: It's the first episode in the second series of the Liverpool-based sitcom written by Carla Lane. Jack is held at gunpoint by two scallywags - only their gun is a water pistol.

programme.title: Bread
programme.desc: More fun with the Boswells as they duck and dive their way through life's mishaps in Carla Lane's Liverpudlian sitcom. Will all run smoothly when Caroline gives birth.

programme.title: Bread
programme.desc: More from Carla Lane's top-rated Liverpudlian sitcom about a family of loveable rogues. Here, Jack tries to make a profit on a batch of antique hats.

programme.title: Farmer Wants A Wife
programme.desc: The tables are turned and it’s up to our Ladies to plan dates for their Farmers..but the Farmers don’t know which Lady has proposed which date. When the dates return home - 2 Ladies leave the farm

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: LES MILLS Born To Move
programme.desc: Designed to nurture a life-long love of physical activity, BORN TO MOVE helps children experience the joy and vitality of moving to music, combining fun and fitness in way that children love.

programme.title: Kiri and Lou
programme.desc: Kiri and Lou follows the adventures of Kiri, a feisty little dinosaur with overpowering emotions, and Lou, a gentle but thoughtful creature. Follow the friendship of these two prehistoric creatures.

programme.title: Toi Time
programme.desc: Are you ready to kanikani? Join Tama, Māia, JoJo and guests including Aunty Anika (Anika Moa) as they dance, sing and have fun around their whare in this fun and educational new series!

programme.title: Smarty Pants
programme.desc: Tired of being the "losers" in class, three buddies are on a mission to become cool - realising along the way that just accepting themselves is the coolest way to be.

programme.title: Sonic Boom
programme.desc: Sonic, Tails, Amy, Knuckles, and Sticks reside on Seaside Island in Hedgehog Village. Together they defend the island from various threats like Doctor Eggman and his robotic creations.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters Of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Kai, Jay, Cole and Zane must master their elemental powers and Spinjitzu weapons to protect the land of Ninjago, which also has an underworld.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Join Peppa and her animal friends on fun-filled adventures - playing games, dressing up and of course jumping in muddy puddles!

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Join Peppa and her animal friends on fun-filled adventures - playing games, dressing up and of course jumping in muddy puddles!

programme.title: Takaro Tribe
programme.desc: Come join the Takaro Tribe as they sing and dance their way through their magical alphabet forest, meeting friends and whanau and learning as they go.

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Les Mills Adult Classes
programme.desc: Les Mills and TVNZ are thrilled to be working together to offer you free access to renowned Les Mills classes; BODYBALANCE, BODYCOMBAT, BODYATTACK, LES MILLS CORE and LES MILLS GRIT Cardio.

programme.title: Everyday Gourmet With Justine Schofield
programme.desc: MasterChef Australia finalist Justine Schofield shares some of her favourite recipes in this cookery program aimed at ideas for the home cook.

programme.title: Farm To Fork
programme.desc: Farm to Fork takes you on a journey across Australia, showcasing fresh local produce to inspire healthy cooking. Discover where your food comes from, support local farmers, and learn how to eat well.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Driven by humour and optimism, Drew Barrymore presents human interest stories and has heartfelt conversations with special guests.

programme.title: Home And Away
programme.desc: Mali and John hatch a plan. Roo’s concern for Alf grows. Sonny makes a triumphant return.

programme.title: Tipping Point Australia
programme.desc: Hosted by Australian tennis legend Todd Woodbridge, Tipping point will push contestants' luck to the very edge in their quest to beat the mesmerising device and win mystery prizes and cash!

programme.title: Bridge Of Lies
programme.desc: Ross Kemp hosts a nail-biting quiz. Using knowledge, strategy and a little luck, contestants must cross the Bridge, spotting the lies. One wrong step and they lose everything!

programme.title: Everyday Gourmet With Justine Schofield
programme.desc: MasterChef Australia finalist Justine Schofield shares some of her favourite recipes in this cookery program aimed at ideas for the home cook.

programme.title: Travel Guides
programme.desc: Each week, five very different groups of ordinary Aussies become travel critics as they head on the same week-long holiday. This week’s destination – Hawaii!

programme.title: Tipping Point Australia
programme.desc: Hosted by Australian tennis legend Todd Woodbridge, Tipping point will push contestants' luck to the very edge in their quest to beat the mesmerising device and win mystery prizes and cash!

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: In this spoof of the series '24,' Bart attempts to stop Jimbo, Dolph and Kearney before they unleash a stink bomb at the school bake sale. S18 E21

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon gets quite a surprise when he visits his mom in Houston, while Raj's "Murder Mystery" party causes tension within the gang. S7 E18

programme.title: Ghosts
programme.desc: Trevor lands himself in trouble when an inappropriate gift to a co-worker forces him into an HR meeting only Jay can handle. S5 E15

programme.title: Home And Away
programme.desc: Abigail’s night out takes an unexpected turn. Cash is stuck with Richie the rookie. Can Roo and Alf get on the same page?

programme.title: Michael McIntyre's Big Show
programme.desc: Stacey Dooley bravely hands over her phone in Send to All, Olly Murs performs his single Dancing on Cars, comedian Alexander Armstrong has a rude awakening in the Midnight Gameshow, and more.

programme.title: The Miniature Wife
programme.desc: Psychological warfare begins as Lindy becomes convinced that Les will never find a way to make her big again. Les’s hostility rises as Lindy continues to toy with him. S1 E7

programme.title: Never Mind The Buzzcocks
programme.desc: Paloma Faith, Benji Webbe and Judi Love join the regulars for the legendary pop culture panel show's revival, hosted by Greg Davies.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: The chefs are challenged to prepare an elevated Mexican dish; celebrity chef Gabriela Camara guest judges; at dinner service, the teams struggle with pork chops and garnishes.

programme.title: Stumble
programme.desc: When Courteney learns that an AI company is looking at Heådltston as a potential site for its new data center, she goes full out to win them over, hoping to get much-needed money. S1 E8

programme.title: Laid
programme.desc: Ruby attends in-person therapy for the first time in years; when her therapist suggests she take a break from romance, it proves to be more of a challenge than anticipated. S1 E5

programme.title: Gladiators UK
programme.desc: Records are smashed, and the Gladiators hunt down the Contenders on the Unleash track. Bradley and Barney host as the gritty Contenders take on the Gladiators for a quarter-final spot.

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Long-running soap following the ups and downs of village life amid the rolling scenery of the Yorkshire Dales.

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: The Hundred With Andy Lee
programme.desc: Andy Lee is joined in the studio by Mike Goldstein, Anne Edmonds, Sam Campbell and a panel of 100 regular Aussies via Zoom to explore the fun behind the facts that make us tick.

programme.title: The Voice Australia
programme.desc: As we reach the midpoint of the Blind Auditions, seven fresh contestants step onto The Voice stage, each aiming to impress the celebrity judges enough to secure a place in their teams.

programme.title: Mecha Builders
programme.desc: Elmo, Cookie Monster, and Abby Cadabby are robot heroes-in-training who use their STEM superpowers to solve wacky larger-than-life problems.

programme.title: Takaro Tribe
programme.desc: Come join the Takaro Tribe as they sing and dance their way through their magical alphabet forest, meeting friends and whanau and learning as they go.

programme.title: Bigsies And Littles
programme.desc: Two penguins, Big Blue & Little Blue, explore everyday life with curiosity, kindness, and song, finding big meaning in little moments.

programme.title: Robin Hood: Mischief In Sherwood
programme.desc: Sherwood is in danger from the tyrannical Prince John! Teenage Robin and his merry band of outlaws fight back.

programme.title: Smarty Pants
programme.desc: Tired of being the "losers" in class, three buddies are on a mission to become cool - realising along the way that just accepting themselves is the coolest way to be.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters Of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Kai, Jay, Cole and Zane must master their elemental powers and Spinjitzu weapons to protect the land of Ninjago, which also has an underworld.

programme.title: Beyblade X
programme.desc: Four beybladers and their genius friend travel the world as team 'Bladebreakers' to win a championship, realising there's much more at stake on the go.

programme.title: Transformers: Earthspark
programme.desc: After the end of the Transformers' war, the Malto family moves to Witwicky, Pennsylvania, to start a new life but their lives soon get entangled with a group of Terran Transformers.

programme.title: The Nanny
programme.desc: Fran finds herself coming between C.C. and her dad. S1 E20

programme.title: Fresh
programme.desc: New season, who dis? Fresh is back and we’re kicking it off at Polyfest - vibes high, culture loud and talent unmatched. From schools halls to stage, it’s all heart, all hype. Chioooooooooooo

programme.title: Shortland Street
programme.desc: Chris is on the case.
